# Ceramic Design System

Ceramic is the standalone Utopia Studio design system. It is shadcn-founded, theme-extensible, Arabic-friendly, and exposed through one shared contract for humans and AI agents.

## Install

- `npm install @utopia-studio-design/design-system`
- `npm install -D @utopia-studio-design/design-system-cli`
- `npx utopia-ds init --theme utopia-default`

## Machine Interfaces

- Capability manifest: `npx utopia-ds manifest --json`
- Cross-domain search: `npx utopia-ds search "<intent>" --json`
- Component contract: `npx utopia-ds component "<name>" --json`
- Template contract: `npx utopia-ds template "<id>" --json`
- Theme policy: `npx utopia-ds theme "<id>" --json`
- Dense docs: `npx utopia-ds docs arabic-friendly --dense`
- Validation: `npx utopia-ds doctor --json`
- MCP stdio server: `npx utopia-ds mcp`
- Programmatic API: `@utopia-studio-design/design-system-cli/api`

## Canonical Source Files

- `packages/design-system/src/manifests/catalog.json`
- `packages/design-system/src/manifests/components.json`
- `packages/design-system/src/manifests/templates.json`
- `packages/design-system/src/manifests/themes.json`
- `docs/design-system/quick-start-ai.md`
- `docs/design-system/ai-platform-plan.md`
- `docs/design-system/arabic-friendly.md`
- `docs/design-system/theme-authoring.md`

## Non-Negotiable Rules

- Use Ceramic exports before raw shadcn primitives.
- Components consume semantic tokens; themes map those roles to primitives.
- Motion-aware components consume the press/page/expand/reveal/icon contract, inherit from MotionProvider, expose motion?: boolean where documented, and always respect prefers-reduced-motion.
- Do not invent props, imports, tokens, Arabic product copy, or component availability.
- Use logical CSS and start/end naming. Verify `dir="rtl"`, mixed scripts, focus, keyboard behavior, and directional mirroring.
- Production websites consume the system; they do not define reusable component logic.
